# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.

Write secure code.
# Category: datastore_security

snapshot:
  repositories:
    s3-repo:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-bucket-name
        region: us-west-2
        access_key: ${ES_S3_ACCESS_KEY}
        secret_key: ${ES_S3_SECRET_KEY}

  schedules:
    daily-snapshot:
      schedule:
        period: "24h"
        time_zone: UTC
      repository: s3-repo

snapshot_restore:
  repositories:
    s3-repo:
      type: s3
      settings:
        bucket: my-bucket-name
        region: us-west-2
        access_key: ${ES_S3_ACCESS_KEY}
        secret_key: ${ES_S3_SECRET_KEY}

  restore:
    repository: s3-repo

xpack:
  snapshot:
    enabled: true
